name: Brent Hennrich for WA03
subject: Always Remember
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRENT HENNRICH FOR WA**](https://shoutout
body:
September 11th, 2001 was undoubtedly one of the darkest days in our nation's history. Terrorist extremists coordinated and carried out attac
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/b2NlIAnxT/c?w=e0RPrlsYrBgq4NCW7q12DeQqkPBR5l1DQ7opkWJf7Bs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2IyTmxJQW54VD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| September 11th, 2001 was undoubtedly one of the darkest days in our nation's history. Terrorist extremists coordinated and carried out attacks on US soil that left 2977 souls dead. On that day, and for the weeks and months that followed, the people of our nation banded together to get through the the catastrophe.
---
| [**Always Remember.**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/b2NlIAnxT/c?w=XNRYFY_KkX_i5E8hKdTzoEg9hKqUNPs8F8_ND7J_Wc0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaDRjLmNvbSIsInIiOiIzNDY1OWY3ZS01NmRmLTRmZGEtNWYwYS1hYzgyNzU3YzI4MTEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| | We showed a unity of purpose, picked each other up and helped each other. We need to find that unity again. Our nation has seen what extremism can do from without. In the past year, we have had a taste of what it is capable when it comes from within.
---
| | A house divided against itself cannot stand. Recent extreme partisanship has created a rift within our government and stopped us from moving forwards. This can not continue. We need Representation that will work for ALL of their constituents, not just the loudest of their voters.
---

Terrorist extremists coordinated and carried out attac | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON! | | | | | September 11th, 2001 was undoubtedly one of the darkest days in our nation's history. Terrorist extremists coordinated and carried out attacks on US soil that left 2977 souls dead. On that day, and for the weeks and months that followed, the people of our nation banded together to get through the the catastrophe. | | | We showed a unity of purpose, picked each other up and helped each other. We need to find that unity again. Our nation has seen what extremism can do from without. In the past year, we have had a taste of what it is capable when it comes from within. | | A house divided against itself cannot stand. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden WH/CDC Political Corruption Exposed
body:
Judicial Watch Seeks Evidence in Court on Secret 1/6 Videos

[INSIDE JW]

TEACHERS UNIONS GAVE GUIDANCE TO CDC DIRECTOR ON SCHOOL COVID
RESTRICTIONS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25805&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9PbmUyTmNXQUVFdz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==]
The all too powerful teacher unions
have been throwing wrenches
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25806&F=T&]
into efforts to reopen schools amid the pandemic, making all manner of
demands with little regard for the students or parents.

Now we know how they have exerted their influence on public officials,
particularly in the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC).

We received 12 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25790&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb21tcy1hZnQtbmVhLWZvaWEtYXVndXN0LTIwMjEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5]
of
records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National
Education Association (NEA) influencing the director of the CDC and
the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as
well as school reopening policy.

Additionally, the CDC Director states that she used the unions’
language in the CDC’s school reopening policy. (Some of these emails
have been previously disclosed.)

We obtained the documents through a FOIA request to the CDC asking
for:

* All emails exchanged between CDC Director Rochelle P. Walensky and
email accounts ending in aft.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2FmdC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5]
and/or nea.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25808&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL25lYS5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5].
* All emails exchanged between CDC Principal Deputy Director Anne
Schuchat and email accounts ending in aft.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2FmdC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5]
and/or nea.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25808&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL25lYS5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5].
* All emails exchanged between CDC Acting Associate Director for
Communications Abbigail Tumpey and email accounts ending in aft.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2FmdC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5]
and/or nea.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25808&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL25lYS5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5].
* All emails exchanged between CDC Associate Director for Policy and
Strategy Robin M. Ikeda and email accounts ending in aft.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2FmdC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5]
and/or nea.org
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25808&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL25lYS5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5].

The records, some of which had been previously released, reveal:

* On February. 8, 2021, Rebecca Pringle
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25791&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvUmViZWNjYV9TLl9QcmluZ2xlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5],
president of the
National Education Association (NEA), emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25792&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb21tcy1hZnQtbmVhLWZvaWEtYXVndXN0LTIwMjEtcGctNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTEwMzA3NDk=]
Director
of the CDC, Rochelle Walensky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25793&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9hYm91dC9sZWFkZXJzaGlwL2RpcmVjdG9yLmh0bT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==],
requesting an
advance copy of the CDC school-related COVID-19 guidance:

I am writing to request an advance copy of CDC school-related COVID-19
guidance that I understand are to be released this week. We will, of
course, keep them confidential until they are public. I want to be
prepared for any media or internal questions that come after they are
released.
Any other information you can offer about the timing of their release
is appreciated....
P.S. Our team will be briefing the CDC and White House staff today on
our embargoed vaccine research. I will be sure you receive the
research memo with our findings after they meet today.

* In an email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25794&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb21tcy1hZnQtbmVhLWZvaWEtYXVndXN0LTIwMjEtcGdzLTExLTE1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==]
on
February 1, 2021, American Federation of Teachers (AFT) Senior
Director of Health Issues, Kelly Trautner

U.S. INVESTS MILLIONS TO BRING RACIAL, ETHNIC ‘EQUITY’ TO STEM
EDUCATION

You will be forgiven if you think operating a computer has nothing to
do with race. And you would be wrong, at least according to the
leftist-controlled National Science Foundation, which is pushing
extremist and racist Critical Race Theory. Our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog has the story
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25809&F=T&].

Weeks after giving a private college hundreds of thousands of dollars
to “identify any existence of systemic inequities” in science,
technology, engineering, and math fields (STEM), the U.S. government
is doling out nearly $2 million to address racial and gender
disparities in high school computer education. The money will come
from the National Science Foundation (NSF), which was created by
Congress seven decades ago to promote the progress of science, advance
national health and prosperity and secure the national defense. With
an annual budget of $8.5 billion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25810&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnNmLmdvdi9hYm91dC9nbGFuY2UuanNwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTExMDMwNzQ5],
the NSF funds more than a
quarter of research conducted at American colleges and universities,
where theft of intellectual property
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=19276&F=T&]
by
Communist China is pervasive.

While the NSF is one of the government agencies that has long
permitted Chinese Communist scientists to steal billions in
taxpayer-funded research, it is also keeping up with the current
climate of political correctness. A few days ago, the agency awarded
two public universities a total of $1.9 million to “address the
historical and current racial and gender disparities in participation
in high school computer science education.” The project is part of a
broader program called Researching Equity and Antiracist Learning in
Computer Science (REAL-CS) that focuses on expanding participation for
black, indigenous, “Latinx” (the new, politically correct
gender-neutral term for Latino or Latina) and Pacific Islander
students by addressing systemic barriers in high school computer
science education. REAL-CS is designed to sustain another
publicly-funded, “equity-focused” initiative called Exploring
Computer Science
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXhwbG9yaW5nY3Mub3JnL2Fib3V0L2Fib3V0LWVjcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==]
(ECS)
dedicated to “democratizing” the field by increasing opportunities
for “traditionally underrepresented” high school students after a
study identified disparities along “race and socioeconomic lines.”

The recent NSF allocations will go to the University of California Los
Angeles (UCLA) and the University of Oregon. UCLA, which has its
own CS Equity Project
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25812&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jZW50ZXJ4LmdzZWlzLnVjbGEuZWR1L2NvbXB1dGVyLXNjaWVuY2UtZXF1aXR5LXByb2plY3Qvc3R1ZGVudC12b2ljZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MTEwMzA3NDk=],
is getting $1,026,000
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25813&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnNmLmdvdi9hd2FyZHNlYXJjaC9zaG93QXdhcmQ/QVdEX0lEPTIxMzc5NTYmSGlzdG9yaWNhbEF3YXJkcz1mYWxzZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56648&L=25814&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnNmLmdvdi9hd2FyZHNlYXJjaC9zaG93QXdhcmQ/QVdEX0lEPTIxMzc5NzUmSGlzdG9yaWNhbEF3YXJkcz1mYWxzZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkxMTAzMDc0OQ==]

clean_body: Judicial Watch Seeks Evidence in Court on Secret 1/6 Videos [INSIDE JW] TEACHERS UNIONS GAVE GUIDANCE TO CDC DIRECTOR ON SCHOOL COVID RESTRICTIONS [==] The all too powerful teacher unions have been throwing wrenches [==] into efforts to reopen schools amid the pandemic, making all manner of demands with little regard for the students or parents. Now we know how they have exerted their influence on public officials, particularly in the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). We received 12 pages [] of records showing the American Federation of Teachers (AFT) and National Education Association (NEA) influencing the director of the CDC and the White House with their own “embargoed vaccine research,” as well as school reopening policy. Additionally, the CDC Director states that she used the unions’ language in the CDC’s school reopening policy. (Some of these emails have been previously disclosed.) We obtained the documents through a FOIA request to the CDC asking for: All emails exchanged between CDC Director Rochelle P. Walensky and email accounts ending in aft.org [] and/or nea.org []. All emails exchanged between CDC Principal Deputy Director Anne Schuchat and email accounts ending in aft.org [] and/or nea.org []. All emails exchanged between CDC Acting Associate Director for Communications Abbigail Tumpey and email accounts ending in aft.org [] and/or nea.org []. All emails exchanged between CDC Associate Director for Policy and Strategy Robin M. Ikeda and email accounts ending in aft.org [] and/or nea.org []. The records, some of which had been previously released, reveal: On February. 8, 2021, Rebecca Pringle [], president of the National Education Association (NEA), emailed [=] Director of the CDC, Rochelle Walensky [==], requesting an advance copy of the CDC school-related COVID-19 guidance: I am writing to request an advance copy of CDC school-related COVID-19 guidance that I understand are to be released this week. We will, of course, keep them confidential until they are public. I want to be prepared for any media or internal questions that come after they are released. Any other information you can offer about the timing of their release is appreciated.... P.S. Our team will be briefing the CDC and White House staff today on our embargoed vaccine research. I will be sure you receive the research memo with our findings after they meet today. In an email exchange [==] on February 1, 2021, American Federation of Teachers (AFT) Senior Director of Health Issues, Kelly Trautner [=] to CDC officials, White House officials, and AFT colleagues, Trautner thanks everyone for the “rich discussion about forthcoming CDC guidance:” Thank you again for Friday’s rich discussion about forthcoming CDC guidance and for your openness to the suggestions made by our president, Randi Weingarten, and the AFT. We are hopeful that lines of communications will remain open, and that we can serve as a true thought partner as you continue the important work toward safe reopening of schools. * We crafted the language below using a NIOSH (National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health) document, as well as language in some of our agreements with school employers. Thank you for considering it White House official Carole Johnson forwards Trautner’ s email to Walensky writing, “AFT followed up w suggested lang[uage] on accommodations per your exchange with Randi.” On February 3, 2021, Walensky replied to CDC, HHS, White House, and AFT officials: I just wanted to circle back and extend my gratitude for the language you have provided below. Regrets for my delay in reply but I wanted to be certain you knew it is being worked into (with just a few small tweaks) the school reopening guidance. We have also included the executive summary you suggested. Please know that we are listening and working hard to ensure your confidence and partnership in this endeavor. Within the “language” provided by Trautner to the White House officials, she suggested adding, Employers should provide reassignment, remote work, or other options for staff who have documented high-risk conditions or who are at increased risk for severe illness from COVID-19 to limit the risk of workplace exposure. Options for reassignment include telework, virtual teaching opportunities, modified job responsibilities, environmental modifications, scheduling flexibility, or temporary reassignment to different job responsibilities. Trautner replied to Walensky: Thank you so much for your responsiveness to the suggestions made by Randi and our team. We are immensely grateful for your genuine desire to earn our confidence and your commitment to partnership. We will pass this message along to Randi. She will certainly be most grateful. On February 11, 2021, Trautner continued the exchange, emailing Walensky: Thank you for your continued openness to our suggestions and input. We would like to share some thoughts regarding the paragraph below which was apparently leaked from the imminent guidance on reopening schools: “At any level of community transmission, all schools can provide in-person instruction (either full or hybrid), through strict adherence to mitigation strategies. Recommended learning modes vary to minimize risk of SARS-CoV-2 transmission in school by emphasizing layered mitigation, including school policies requiring universal and correct mask use. The recommended learning modes (in-person, hybrid) depend on the level of community transmission and strict adherence to mitigation.” It would be great to see the insertion some variation of the following: “In the event high-community transmission results from a new variant of SARS-CoV-2, a new update of these guidelines may be necessary.” We are deeply concerned about likely implications this language will have in schools where strict adherence to mitigation strategies is lacking or is impossible to implement, particularly those schools in high-density, crumbling infrastructure areas, and particularly when community transmission is high. We don't believe that any current research has demonstrated that all schools in those areas can safely reopen. On March 17, 2021, Trautner emailed [] Walensky about a call from Weingarten, saying: “Randi is hoping to schedule a call with your folks about reopening issue, including maintaining mitigation protections and what might be needed in the context of higher vaccination numbers.” On March 23, 2021, AFT President Randi Weingarten emailed [=] Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona [] and Walensky, saying that she had noted the “shift” in CDC’s guidance regarding physical distancing in schools with “keen interest.” On March 20, 2021, the CDC issued new “guidance [ reducing suggested physical distancing from 6 feet to 3 feet for students. Weingarten stated: [A]lthough I was very worried about the implications of the shift, I reserved judgment until we could review the new studies that were presented.... * [W]e are not convinced that the evidence supports changing physical distancing requirements at this time. Our concern is that the cited studies do not identify the baseline mitigation strategies needed to support 3 feet of physical distancing. [W]e conclude that any shift from 6 feet to 3 feet must be accompanied by, at a minimum, universal and correct masking; effective ventilation; thorough cleaning of buildings; regular COVID-19 testing of teachers, staff and students; effective contact tracing and quarantine/isolation protocols; and the availability of vaccines to all people in schools who are eligible. Weakening one layer of layered mitigation demands that the other layers must be strengthened. We strongly urge you, in any discussion of this shift, to forcefully insist on strict and strengthened adherence to the other mitigation strategies.... After months of mixed messaging and misinformation, consistency from our public health officials is a welcome change. But as educators with the expertise on how physical distancing works in schools, we have immediate logistical questions.... Weingarten added a list of questions regarding how school personnel can move about, whether simulcasting lessons was still necessary, and what the government’s mitigation strategies timeline was. On April 9, 2021, Weingarten emailed [] Walensky about “Requesting Meeting about Variants,” stating: “On behalf of the AFT we would request a meeting with the CDC on the impact of the Covid variants, particularly what we are seeing in schools and communities.” Walensky replied, “Dear Randi, Many thanks for reaching out. I’ll connect with my team and work to make this happen.” What qualifies partisan teachers unions, other than generous contributions to allied politicians [], to provide the CDC with public health guidance on reopening schools? The CDC is corrupted by politics and is dishonest when it suggests it is merely “following the science.” JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS EVIDENCE IN LAWSUIT AGAINST U.S. CAPITOL POLICE FOR JANUARY 6 VIDEOS Nancy Pelosi and her U.S. Capitol Police must have something to hide about January 6. Why else would they be hiding evidence from the American people? Undeterred by their stonewalling, we filed a motion for discovery [] in our lawsuit against the United States Capitol Police (USCP) for videos and emails and videos concerning the disturbance at the U.S. Capitol on January 6 (Judicial Watch v. United States Capitol Police [] (No. 1:21-cv-00401)). Congress exempts itself from the Freedom of Information Act, we brought this case under the common law right of access to public records. The US Capitol Police declined to produce any records about the disturbance, however, arguing [] that the requested videos and other records are not “public records” and the public interest doesn’t warrant their release. We asked the court to grant us the ability to gather evidence about the preservation and use of the infamous January 6 videos: This case concerns whether the public has a right of access to records about what Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives Nancy Pelosi has describe as “one of the darkest days in our nation’s history,” “an attack on our very democracy [,]” and “an attack on the peaceful transfer of power.” Speaker Pelosi also has stated, “It is imperative that we find the truth of that day and ensure that such an assault on our Capitol and Democracy cannot ever again happen.” To find out the truth about what took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 and to understand how Defendant United States Capitol Police and other government entities responded on that day, Plaintiff Judicial Watch requested access to certain communications and video recordings. * (Judicial Watch) therefore moves for limited discovery to seek evidence to prove that the requested records are public records subject to the common law right of access and that the public’s interest in disclosure outweighs the government’s interest in keeping the records secret. We filed [=] the lawsuit for: Email communications between the U.S. Capitol Police Executive Team and the Capitol Police Board concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021 through January 10, 2021. Email communications of the Capitol Police Board with the Federal Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Justice, and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021through January 10, 2021. All video footage from within the Capitol between 12 pm and 9 pm on January 6, 2021 As the Pelosi House seeks the confidential phone and social media records of countless Americans concerning January 6, its U.S. Capitol Police is covering up 14,000 hours of video about what really happened that day. The U.S. Capitol Police should be required to explain under oath its reasons for refusing to turn over even one second of January 6 video to the American people. U.S. INVESTS MILLIONS TO BRING RACIAL, ETHNIC ‘EQUITY’ TO STEM EDUCATION You will be forgiven if you think operating a computer has nothing to do with race. And you would be wrong, at least according to the leftist-controlled National Science Foundation, which is pushing extremist and racist Critical Race Theory. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the story [=]. Weeks after giving a private college hundreds of thousands of dollars to “identify any existence of systemic inequities” in science, technology, engineering, and math fields (STEM), the U.S. government is doling out nearly $2 million to address racial and gender disparities in high school computer education. The money will come from the National Science Foundation (NSF), which was created by Congress seven decades ago to promote the progress of science, advance national health and prosperity and secure the national defense. With an annual budget of $8.5 billion [], the NSF funds more than a quarter of research conducted at American colleges and universities, where theft of intellectual property [==] by Communist China is pervasive. While the NSF is one of the government agencies that has long permitted Chinese Communist scientists to steal billions in taxpayer-funded research, it is also keeping up with the current climate of political correctness. A few days ago, the agency awarded two public universities a total of $1.9 million to “address the historical and current racial and gender disparities in participation in high school computer science education.” The project is part of a broader program called Researching Equity and Antiracist Learning in Computer Science (REAL-CS) that focuses on expanding participation for black, indigenous, “Latinx” (the new, politically correct gender-neutral term for Latino or Latina) and Pacific Islander students by addressing systemic barriers in high school computer science education. REAL-CS is designed to sustain another publicly-funded, “equity-focused” initiative called Exploring Computer Science [==] (ECS) dedicated to “democratizing” the field by increasing opportunities for “traditionally underrepresented” high school students after a study identified disparities along “race and socioeconomic lines.” The recent NSF allocations will go to the University of California Los Angeles (UCLA) and the University of Oregon. UCLA, which has its own CS Equity Project [=], is getting $1,026,000 [==] from the NSF to help prepare teachers nationwide to reach thousands of minority high school students to take “an equity-focused CS course,” according to the grant announcement. The University of Oregon will receive $873,999 [==] to do the same. “Overall, the key goal of REAL-CS is to create the necessary conditions and capacity in high schools that lead to equitable participation of students of color in high-quality computer science classes,” according to the NSF. The agency assures the costly program will create systemic change by increasing the use of racially and culturally inclusive practices, refreshing existing curriculum and supplementary curricular materials with antiracist design tenets, and conducting deep qualitative research nationwide that investigates equity-oriented teacher beliefs and practices. Weeks before awarding the UCLA and Oregon grants, the NSF gave a private liberal arts college in Lewisburg, Pennsylvania more than a quarter of a million dollars to uncover “any existence of systemic inequities and advancement barriers related to gender, race, and ethnicity in STEM faculty.” The $271,594 grant [==] will fund a project at Bucknell University, which has an enrollment of 3,724 [==], that uses quantitative and qualitative data to develop and implement a plan to remove such barriers. “This project will bring significant insights into issues facing women and underrepresented minority faculty that are unique to STEM disciplines and in a primarily undergraduate institution that strives to enhance diversity in students, faculty and staff,” the NSF writes in the grant announcement. The project is part of a larger initiative called Self-Assessment of Gender, Racial, and Ethnic Equity (AGREE) in STEM Faculty that aims to uncover systemic inequities centered around recruitment, retention, and promotion processes facing women and faculty members underrepresented in STEM disciplines. The NSF has been embroiled in its fair share of scandals over the years. Most recently, the agency was outed along with several others, including the National Institutes of Health and the Department of Energy’s national laboratories, for long permitting Communists working in the U.S. to steal scientific research. This was the subject of a scathing U.S. Senate report that determined billions of dollars in scientific research funded by American taxpayers have been stolen by China and the U.S. government has no viable plan to stop the ongoing theft of the highly valued intellectual property, which congressional investigators assure “has contributed to China’s global rise over the last 20 years.” The NSF was also embroiled in a porn scandal years ago in which employees spent significant portions of their workdays watching, downloading and emailing pornography [==] on government computers without ever getting caught. Until next week ... name: Jim Jordan
subject: No. Vaccine. Mandates.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58304577:JXypvA2NI:m:1:3253819041:C713903364C2DE62AD357B5DF50C82FF:r)
---

Peter,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58304577:JXypvA2NI:m:1:3253819041:C713903364C2DE62AD357B5DF50C82FF:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58304577:JXypvA2NI:m:1:3253819041:C713903364C2DE62AD357B5DF50C82FF:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 11th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58304577:JXypvA2NI:m:1:3253819041:C713903364C2DE62AD357B5DF50C82FF:r)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**
**Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58304577:JXypvA2NI:m:1:3253819041:C713903364C2DE62AD357B5DF50C82FF:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role. We 've lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 11th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated! The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? We are now in our FINAL WEEK of the recall against Gavin Newsom. Voting by mail has been going on for over 3 weeks now, and we're approaching the finish line.

When the recall against Newsom began over a year ago, the corporate media and radical Left wrote us off. Now, **we 're just days away from finally holding Newsom accountable** for his overreaching control, his hypocrisy, and his countless failures.

**This final week is the most critical of the whole recall effort.** We're pushing to secure every last ballot in support of the recall that we can, so can pull off a historic defeat of the leftist establishment that has destroyed California.

We need your help to keep our voter outreach operations fully funded so we can secure the votes we need to finish the job of recalling Newsom.

[**Will you stick with us through this FINAL WEEK and help secure the victory we 've been working toward for over a year with a critical contribution of $10, $25, $50 or $100 or more to Larry Elder's ballot committee?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58305092:6ue7KA2KN:m:1:3253819041:E360A05C56F366E20521585946E4F65B:r)

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Now more than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a6290731ab908e7/c6940b2a6316628dc3d6b838967d376c/36963) Peter, 20 years ago today, after one of the worst attacks on our soil in our great nation’s history, Americans came together in the days and weeks that followed – some say like never before. We made a promise that day, and resolved to keep it, that we should never forget 9/11. It seems many have forgotten that promise. I have not. I hope you haven’t either. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a6290731ab908e7/8f817bf3d804659cc3d6b838967d376c/36963) **Many politicians today will send you messages about the ‘countless’ lives lost, but each one of these lives mattered. We must never forget. **
* **2,977 died in the September 11 attacks, 412 were emergency workers**
* **2,448 American servicemembers were killed in the ensuing war in Afghanistan**
* **3,846 US Contractors were killed in the Afghanistan war**
* **66,000 Afghan national military and police have been killed**
* **1,144 allied service members have been killed**
* **47,245 Afghan civilians have been killed during the war**
* **444 aid workers have been killed**
* **72 journalists have been killed**

Today, we should truly #NeverForget 9/11. For America,
Casey Wardynski id:2021-09-02-13:44:28:437t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a6290731ab908e7/4cac57d648e0828ac3d6b838967d376c/36963)

name: Great America Update
subject: #1 Item to Hoard in 2021
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c337%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8L1oMErgLUXHLkBnpUZJfA&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2021
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65431%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sN5BbyVWVfyMZspcufJLhA&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65432%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hy9QumbYznKi9%2bkZKYGlDw&sysid=1) **Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65433%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KAsvVR%2bqCJwDWT5YZ43V6g&sysid=1) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special: **It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window. So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because... [**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65434%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GcZCSB4xEo%2bgPQtoTFJDHg&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2LomQ3T1dIWCi2jTqxnzLw&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65446%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qBB%2bbw0tT57g2TsHvysL6A&sysid=1) **You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65447%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ef1LQiJBkPhZUSa4Ben8mA&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try. Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2LomQ3T1dIWCi2jTqxnzLw&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [take action](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65448%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zy2eJup7LqtXVX7hXxLtkw&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65449%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gokj3XV3GCVXlKxs%2fcp4Ig&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2LomQ3T1dIWCi2jTqxnzLw&sysid=1)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit in the mail and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmered. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It’s a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our Food4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65445%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2LomQ3T1dIWCi2jTqxnzLw&sysid=1)**

107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314
[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c337%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8L1oMErgLUXHLkBnpUZJfA&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c337%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8L1oMErgLUXHLkBnpUZJfA&sysid=1)

body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2021
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztcov5o457eus917tn0u2p4efme7g7i5mfedgido_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cphm8or4clh2bs). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. name: Mark Walker
subject: Special Day of Remembrance & Reflection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Mourning those lost and strengthening our resolve together.
Dear Peter, Twenty years ago today, we witnessed pure evil. The horrific events of 9/11, carried out by radical Islamic extremists, shook America and the world to its core.
They wanted to tear down our great nation.
Instead, the events on September 11th, 2001, brought together the American people in a way rarely seen in our nation’s history – we emerged from that day strengthened and united in the pursuit of bringing those responsible to justice.
Today, I hope you will join me as we observe together Patriot Day 2021 and renew our promises to NEVER FORGET and STAND UNITED as a nation.
**At 10:00am today we will be hosting a service to commemorate the events of 9/11. We invite you to join us in a time of reflection, honor, and faith. Hundreds of musicians from across the Triad have come together to produce this event. For those who cannot attend in person, we invite you to join us via the[livestream link available here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/71dfc1d50a5767b7c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**.
No one should have to go through today alone, so if you don’t already have plans with loved ones, I hope you’re able to join us for this special service. There truly is no other event like it in North Carolina, or the entire Southeastern United States.
May we honor the memory of those lost, and may we never forget.
For America,
Mark Walker | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/6caf6825e2a03de2c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/8e9b78f7280cc206c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/f5632f42c19974dac3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/5e56a86b3bbebbf4c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1dc6fd0e533d52e3/bfe293e0f687f9a2c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: Team Ortt
subject: 20 Years Later. We Still Remember.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,
Today is a difficult one. Twenty years removed from one of the most impactful days of my life, and the emotions still run as deep as ever. On 9-11-01, our nation faced an attack on our freedoms, our democracy, our values, and our American way of life.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9ljKz-wDHJvFbb-vMLxGC8_Hkri-CK5hQUWucDXKwrFieHC7ol1jKUAgZ4Ac7ZDAdsuoSL89NzX6XsivGP0-Cej36Nbs0fWCZYnTKXKnBxU8EVt5lJpUFTUJU8fn9spSid7Umi7vtz6bU2vSyxEPnoPMayuSB7nDtKFFT2f5FvY0SumgCEZ0g==&c=J8WvouYyvrxEjIF0VH85BAUxM0IFvWVIEqTkrR0W0T6GKzpBZxiWOA==&ch=iOBFNkwbDXYTns-Bl9l1DVFVBoQwqQ90e1urjWT2qfC6RNB_9vhuBQ==)
---
| Like many of you, that September morning changed my life forever. September 11th was the reason I enlisted in the New York Army National Guard and pledged service to our nation. As I watched our fellow Americans and our nation attacked on that day, I knew I had to do my part to protect the country I love so much.
Today, we remember the loss of thousands of innocent American lives that morning and the lives of our service members who were killed in the military operations that followed. We remember the anger, the heartache, and the sadness we felt watching our television screens.
However, that's not all that I remember...
I also remember the togetherness and kindness toward one another that rose from the ashes. When Americans are unified, there is nothing that we cannot accomplish.
While we must never forget the events of 9/11/01 and the evil that was on display for the entire globe to witness, we must also dig deep inside our minds and remember the strength, unity, and togetherness that came from it.
God bless. Never forget.

---
|
---
| PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
---
| |
---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: we will remember
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
| | Derek,

Twenty years ago today, our lives and our nation changed forever. Nearly 3,000 lives were lost, and far too many families experienced unimaginable pain, grief, and suffering. As Americans, we will never forget what was lost that day.

And we will never forget the countless acts of courage and selflessness we saw then -- those who put themselves on the front lines, who risked their lives running toward danger for the safety of others.

We are forever grateful to the hundreds of thousands of military men and women who have bravely fought for our country. These heroes inspire us to remember that even in the darkest hours, there is always a brighter day ahead.

I hope you will join me in taking a quiet moment to reflect on the loss and sacrifice of this day, and share in my hope for a stronger, brighter future for our Commonwealth and our country.

\- Terry

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

_If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/01f08451-ab12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/d84e62b1-ff12-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODRlNjJiMS1mZjEyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tP4tEiHqisataJkHPzlu0bZ0twLLoAA9JMWa6YKWKw=&id=108609855)._

name: Kevin Hern
subject: We Must NEVER Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
This day of infamy that will remain forever etched in our hearts.
Peter, 20 years ago today, unimaginable horror was inflicted upon our nation at the hands of radical Islamic extremists. They wanted to tear down our great nation. Instead, they united the American people as we had not been in a very long time. **It’s a day of infamy that will remain forever etched in our hearts._We must NEVER forget_.** As we observe Patriot Day 2021, we commemorate the lives of the 2,977 precious souls lost on 9/11. We recognize the incredible challenges faced by the more than 6,000 people who were injured, many of whom are still struggling with their recoveries to this day. And we pray for solace for the loved ones left behind. It’s also important that we take a special moment to acknowledge the heroes of 9/11. They include the 412 first responders we lost in New York City, who rushed toward rapidly unfolding disaster to save countless lives, and the passengers on Flight 93 who took action to prevent even greater tragedy. Today, let us renew our commitment to ensure such an attack can never happen again. We must always remain vigilant, and stand UNITED as Americans, to ensure our country remains a beacon of strength and hope around the world. Thank you for allowing me a moment to share my thoughts on this important day of reflection and remembrance. Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7c95d23d78edf393/a06eb536bfa49562c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/7c95d23d78edf393/f9837a2b0dd4c2b5c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

clean_body: This day of infamy that will remain forever etched in our hearts. Peter, 20 years ago today, unimaginable horror was inflicted upon our nation at the hands of radical Islamic extremists. They wanted to tear down our great nation. Instead, they united the American people as we had not been in a very long time. It’s a day of infamy that will remain forever etched in our hearts.We must NEVER forget. As we observe Patriot Day 2021, we commemorate the lives of the 2,977 precious souls lost on 9/11. We recognize the incredible challenges faced by the more than 6,000 people who were injured, many of whom are still struggling with their recoveries to this day. And we pray for solace for the loved ones left behind. It’s also important that we take a special moment to acknowledge the heroes of 9/11. They include the 412 first responders we lost in New York City, who rushed toward rapidly unfolding disaster to save countless lives, and the passengers on Flight 93 who took action to prevent even greater tragedy. Today, let us renew our commitment to ensure such an attack can never happen again. We must always remain vigilant, and stand UNITED as Americans, to ensure our country remains a beacon of strength and hope around the world. Thank you for allowing me a moment to share my thoughts on this important day of reflection and remembrance. Sincerely, Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- id:2021-09-03-17:31:36:930t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I want to thank those who bravely served
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | |
---

---
Friend,

Today, we reflect on the solemn 20th anniversary of the September 11 attack on our country.

I want to take a moment to remember all the brave individuals -- from the first responders and medical providers to the members of our armed services -- who selflessly served our country at its time of great need. Their many sacrifices exemplify our nation and our people's highest virtues.

My thoughts and prayers are with all those who grieve today, especially the families of the military men and women we lost in Afghanistan. I hope you'll join me in lifting up their memories.

May God continue to bless America.

\-- Charlie

---

name: David and Ian, Never Again PAC
subject: Twenty years later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Twenty years ago today, our nation experienced an unthinkable tragedy. We watched in horror as a terrorist attack on American soil claimed the lives of nearly 3,000 people. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35589391/305529782/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkNjUwNjkyLTA4MTMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AQNSLFgTwLYDQPzHRURS_eiBGUNGgEXrPUO6_3G81bY=&emci=55a2195a-a111-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ad650692-0813-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Team,

Twenty years ago today, our nation experienced an unthinkable tragedy. We watched in horror as a terrorist attack on American soil claimed the lives of nearly 3,000 people.

In the midst of the immense pain that we experienced, we also witnessed the bravery and resilience of the American people. From the heroic first responders who put their own lives on the line to save as many people as possible to the communities that came together to provide support, we saw the very best of the American people that day.

September 11, 2001 was a day that forever changed countless lives and our country as a whole. As we reflect two decades later, our thoughts go out to the survivors and families of the victims who are still dealing with the physical and mental repercussions of this tragic event.

We must also take time to remember the soldiers who volunteered to protect our nation in the aftermath of 9/11, many of whom paid the ultimate sacrifice to keep us safe.

Today, we'll be taking a moment to honor the lives lost as a result of 9/11 and keep in our hearts their loved ones and survivors. We hope you'll do the same.

Thank you,

David and Ian

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

body:
Unite the Country [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA005/1/78987/images/utc-web-logo.png]
This day 20 years ago, terror struck our shores.

September 11, 2001 was a horrific day in our history. Today we stop to honor and remember the lives lost that day.

We honor the first responders who rushed into the towers to save lives and the brave civilians who sacrificed everything to help others escape.

So join us and President Biden as we honor this solemn anniversary.

Thank you,

Unite the Country
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.
Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Twenty years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Peter,

Today, we mourn those we lost twenty years ago on 9/11 and honor the brave first responders who made heroic sacrifices to save others. We all remember where we were and what we were doing when this tragedy occurred and we will never forget them and their service to our country. Our prayers are with their families and loved ones.

Our law enforcement and first responders put their lives on the line every day. And their dedication helps to make our communities a safer place for people to live and work.

On that dark day twenty years ago, so many people stepped up at a moment’s notice to help their fellow Americans. It was a time when we all came together. That spirit is the best of who we are, and I hope that spirit can carry on today, despite the trouble and turmoil we face as a country.

When we are united, bravery and strength will always prevail.

God bless our great state and our great country.

Roy

| 20 years ago today, the course of this country changed forever as a result of horrific acts of terror against our people.
Today, we remember all of those who tragically lost their lives on September 11th - let's pray for the fallen and their families, and be thankful for the bravery of our heroic First Responders.
---
|

| This 20th Anniversary of Commemoration is a day for solemn remembrance of all of the innocent American lives that were robbed from us.
But it is also a reminder of America's resolve, determination, and strength - these attacks did not break the spirit of the greatest nation in the world. Instead, they only reinforced our patriotism and national pride.
This resilience is one of many reasons why the United States of America is the greatest, most righteous nation that has ever existed.
God bless all of those who sacrificed for her, and may we Never Forget what happened on September 11th, 2001.
Sincerely,

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Remembering 9/11 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
On the 11th of September in 2001, I was in Norway leading a headquarters team on an inspection tour of Marine Corps equipment positioned in-country in the event of an emergency deployment of forces. I had just returned to our hotel in Trondheim after shopping for some craft gifts for our kids.
As I walked into the hotel, every single person was staring at the televisions in the lobby. An airliner had just impacted the first tower in Manhattan. As we watched, another airliner crashed into the second tower. We were stunned. Shortly after, another plane hit the Pentagon, coming to rest a short distance from my office near the center of the building.
Thankfully, none of our staff was injured or killed...but many others were – in Manhattan, in a field in Pennsylvania, and at the Pentagon. Today, we remember anew the losses of that day – and the continuing effects on first responders, families, and other innocents from that tragic event. We must never forget.
http://stewartnavarre.com/ [http://stewartnavarre.com/]
-- Stewart

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 20 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC |
body:
Peter,

It’s hard to believe that it has been 20 years since that day. We all remember where we were on September 11 — forever seared into our memory. I think about the families who lost loved ones, and an entire generation of children who have grown up in a world that changed forever because of this day.

>From the frontlines on active duty - West Point, two combat deployments, the Pentagon & home - I’ve witnessed how the heartbreak of 9/11 bore a renewed grit and resiliency of the country we love with every fabric of our being.

But, this resolve was molded out of tragedy. The personal losses still haunt me and so many of us who experience survivors’ guilt - especially today on 9/11 - but we press on, living by the spirit and belief of making our nation a more perfect Union.

Post Traumatic Growth and always ensuring we never leave anyone behind - these have been the mantras of so many of my brother and sister Veterans of our Post 9/11 Generation.

I hear you. I wept quietly and solemnly with you today. I will continue to fight for you for all the days ahead.

Love,
Your Fellow American & Brother

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former U.S. Congressman

body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35598001/305554816/-1425992037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA4MGU1My0xOTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8JufBJeGCQ6vaGsTtgqS4bHGw6nVN9jBfXP22CMaY0c=&emci=09de6049-4712-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=01080e53-1913-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18634996)**
Friends,

On September 11, 2001, our nation was attacked in a senseless act of violence. I wanted to take a moment to remember those we lost — friends, families, colleagues, and first responders.

20 years later, we must never forget what happened that day, and it is our duty to honor those lives.

Although the events of September 11th were devastating, we came together as a country and showed resilience. We all watched as first responders, firefighters, and everyday Americans stepped up heroically to help. To me, that is the spirit of being American — coming together in the most challenging circumstances.

I hope you will join me in remembering and honoring the lives we lost on September 11th.

\--Tom O'Halleran

subject: Remembering the lives we lost

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35597982/305554701/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA4MGU1My0xOTEzLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQ2w-NnRbyFk0lLkjObQXs-soYodxcFSL-LgDsQq0Xk=)

| | Folks -- Our world changed on September 11, 2001. Today, I’m remembering the 2,996 Americans that died on that day 20 years ago. They were mothers, fathers, friends, family, neighbors, spouses, and so much more to so many people. To the 196 Nevadans who were first responders or survivors of the attacks, I join every American in sending my comfort and warmth. While 20 years may have passed since that horrific day, we’ve made a collective promise to never forget the souls we lost. So, folks, take this as an invitation to hold your loved ones close and be grateful for the gift of life as we’re reminded today that neither is promised to us tomorrow. Wishing you a peaceful and observant day of remembrance. Warmly, Susie Lee

name: Karen Bass
subject: In remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress |
body:
It's now been 20 years since the deadly September 11, 2001, terrorist attacks. Today is a day for reflection, friend.

Innocent lives were taken that morning, and our nation was forever changed. In the two decades since the attacks, families have grown up and communities have been rebuilt with an emptiness that can never be filled. The devastation and grief felt that day will never be forgotten.

Any commemoration of 9/11 is incomplete without honoring those who served and mourning those who gave the ultimate sacrifice for our nation.

Today, I'm remembering, but I am also hoping for a better tomorrow and for an even stronger America. Today, I dream of an America where our freedoms and civil liberties are recognized and protected. I dream of an America free of racism, xenophobia, and Islamophobia. And I dream of an America where every child has the safety and security they need to reach their full potential.

In solidarity,

Karen

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress |
---------------------------------------------

Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: There is so much more that unites us than divides us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Dear Peter,

Today marks 20 years since the horrific September 11th attacks devastated our nation and shocked the world. The amount of loss and pain that day was unfathomable, and many survivors are still experiencing both the mental and physical repercussions of the attacks to this day.

When I think back on September 11, 2001, I am not only reminded of these tragedies but of the bravery we saw. **I draw hope from the perseverance of the American spirit that was on display that day and in the days and years that followed.**

While the flames were still burning, nurses, EMTs, firefighters, and countless others ran toward the fire to save their fellow countrymen. Elected officials from both sides of the aisle came together to secure the resources necessary for recovery efforts.

Thousands of soldiers signed up to fight for our nation and were deployed overseas. Many made the ultimate sacrifice for our country, and all took on tremendous risks. Now, 20 years later, our soldiers have finally come home.

On today's anniversary, I hope you will join me in a moment of silence to remember those who died on September 11th and those who lost their lives as a result of the attacks -- some many years after the fact.

Let us also thank those who helped us heal and repair. We can honor their actions and sacrifices by coming together once again, as one nation, to protect and strengthen our democracy for all Americans. Despite how divisive things may seem, there is so much more that unites us than divides us.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gddXeatVqOf_URydjaZo-4zGkkruL6KSvw6LuJJmQRM=/R0vpz0uh1EDP2vzML1Q5OFweodCmjL5zKln16U7xYu4=).
clean_body: Dear Peter, Today marks 20 years since the horrific September 11th attacks devastated our nation and shocked the world. The amount of loss and pain that day was unfathomable, and many survivors are still experiencing both the mental and physical repercussions of the attacks to this day. When I think back on September 11, 2001, I am not only reminded of these tragedies but of the bravery we saw. I draw hope from the perseverance of the American spirit that was on display that day and in the days and years that followed. While the flames were still burning, nurses, EMTs, firefighters, and countless others ran toward the fire to save their fellow countrymen. Elected officials from both sides of the aisle came together to secure the resources necessary for recovery efforts. Thousands of soldiers signed up to fight for our nation and were deployed overseas. Many made the ultimate sacrifice for our country, and all took on tremendous risks. Now, 20 years later, our soldiers have finally come home. On today's anniversary, I hope you will join me in a moment of silence to remember those who died on September 11th and those who lost their lives as a result of the attacks -- some many years after the fact. Let us also thank those who helped us heal and repair. We can honor their actions and sacrifices by coming together once again, as one nation, to protect and strengthen our democracy for all Americans. Despite how divisive things may seem, there is so much more that unites us than divides us. It's an honor to represent you, Derek = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.
